name: Sesame Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the asparagus in a large skillet of boiling salted water until almost crisp tender, about 5 minutes.
2. Drain the asparagus and transfer to a bowl of ice water to cool. Drain and pat dry.
- This step can be completed up to 1 day in advance. Cover tightly and refrigerate.
3. Melt butter with sesame oil in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the asparagus and sauté until crisp tender, about 2 minutes.
5. Mix in lemon juice and soy sauce, tossing to coat evenly.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. Transfer the asparagus to a serving platter.
8. Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the top and serve.
